recipe.title: Beef tagine
recipe.description: A beef tagine is a strew with attitude, Jamie's beef tagine recipe is all about the spices and slow cooking, giving all the flavours time to develop

ingredients.name: ½ a bunch of fresh coriander
level tablespoon ras el hanout spice mix

steps.descr: Mix all the spice rub ingredients together in a small...
steps.instructions: Mix all the spice rub ingredients together in a small bowl with a good pinch of sea salt and black pepper.

on_enter.say: Mix all the spice rub ingredients together in a small bowl with a good pinch of sea salt and black pepper.

steps.descr: Put the beef into a large bowl, massage it with the...
steps.instructions: Put the beef into a large bowl, massage it with the spice rub, then cover with clingfilm and place in the fridge for a couple of hours, preferably overnight.

on_enter.say: Put the beef into a large bowl, massage it with the spice rub, then cover with clingfilm and place in the fridge for a couple of hours, preferably overnight.

steps.descr: When you’re ready to cook, peel and finely chop the...
steps.instructions: When you’re ready to cook, peel and finely chop the onion, and pick the coriander leaves, finely chopping the stalks.

on_enter.say: When you’re ready to cook, peel and finely chop the onion, and pick the coriander leaves, finely chopping the stalks.

steps.descr: Heat a generous lug of oil in a tagine or casserole pan...
steps.instructions: Heat a generous lug of oil in a tagine or casserole pan over a medium heat, add the meat and fry for 5 minutes to seal. Add the onion and coriander stalks and fry for a further 5 minutes.

on_enter.say: Heat a generous lug of oil in a tagine or casserole pan over a medium heat, add the meat and fry for 5 minutes to seal. Add the onion and coriander stalks and fry for a further 5 minutes.

steps.descr: Drain and tip in the chickpeas, followed by the...
steps.instructions: Drain and tip in the chickpeas, followed by the tomatoes, breaking them up with a spoon, then pour in 400ml of stock and stir well. Bring to the boil, then cover and reduce to a low heat for 1½ hours.

on_enter.say: Drain and tip in the chickpeas, followed by the tomatoes, breaking them up with a spoon, then pour in 400ml of stock and stir well. Bring to the boil, then cover and reduce to a low heat for 1½ hours.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, deseed and chop the squash into 5cm chunks,...
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, deseed and chop the squash into 5cm chunks, then destone and roughly tear the prunes. Toast the almonds in a dry frying pan until lightly golden, then tip into a bowl.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, deseed and chop the squash into 5cm chunks, then destone and roughly tear the prunes. Toast the almonds in a dry frying pan until lightly golden, then tip into a bowl.

steps.descr: When the time's up, add the squash, prunes and remaining...
steps.instructions: When the time's up, add the squash, prunes and remaining stock. Give everything a gentle stir, then pop the lid back on and continue cooking for another 1½ hours. Keep an eye on it, adding splashes of water, if needed.

on_enter.say: When the time's up, add the squash, prunes and remaining stock. Give everything a gentle stir, then pop the lid back on and continue cooking for another 1½ hours. Keep an eye on it, adding splashes of water, if needed.

steps.descr: At this stage, remove the lid and check the consistency
steps.instructions: At this stage, remove the lid and check the consistency. If it seems a bit too runny, simmer for 5 to 10 minutes, more with the lid off – the beef should be really tender and flaking apart now, so have a taste and season to taste.

on_enter.say: At this stage, remove the lid and check the consistency. If it seems a bit too runny, simmer for 5 to 10 minutes, more with the lid off – the beef should be really tender and flaking apart now, so have a taste and season to taste.

steps.descr: Scatter the coriander leaves over the tagine along with...
steps.instructions: Scatter the coriander leaves over the tagine along with the toasted almonds. Serve with a big bowl of lightly seasoned couscous and dive in.

on_enter.say: Scatter the coriander leaves over the tagine along with the toasted almonds. Serve with a big bowl of lightly seasoned couscous and dive in.
